channel.title: Ajith Kumar – Reflection Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Ajith Kumar – Reflection Blog

item.title: My Second Reflection-Blog
item.description:
Introduction

I welcome you again in my second reflection blog. In this blog I will be talking about all my learnings and experiences during the Second Unit of the course. The second unit was the last unit before the mid-semester-break. For the First Unit there was not any written exams. But for the second one we had one big exam of 50 marks before we could get the mid-semester-break. So in this blog there is a lot to cover, from learnings to exams. Also, this was the unit where I struggled a lot. So stay tuned and I will take you through all my journey from start to the end of the Second Unit. Let’s begin the journey.

item.title: My First Reflection-Blog
item.description:
Introduction

This is a reflection blog where I will be reflecting back on all those learinings that I had from start of the second semester. The name of the major course that I have this semester is " Becoming a Reflective Information Scientists". As the name suggests, we in this course deal with datas, informations and try to derive usful insights and take decisions based on it. By now we are not learning any programming language this semester but I think we now are trying to build the foundations on which all the programming languages and information science courses will be grounded. I am now at the mid of this semester. As I move ahead with this course I will update all my learnings and experiences in the upcoming reflection blog.
